title: Remove completed AI Cockpit review plan
outOfScope: Deleting any other plan, archive record, release asset, or governance evidence.

sources.reason: Archive integrity is preserved and verified.

riskAssessment.reason: One completed plan document is removed; archive and release evidence are explicitly preserved.

executionDecision.reason: User explicitly requested plan cleanup after completion of Work Item 18.

preReviewWarnings: Verify only the completed comprehensive review plan is deleted and all Work Item/release evidence remains present.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The completed comprehensive review plan document is removed.
All W1-W17 archive pairs and v0.5.31 release evidence remain present.
AI checks, archive integrity, and quality verification pass.
guidelines: Preserve archived Work Item and release evidence.
Limit cleanup to the explicitly completed plan document.

intent.problem: The comprehensive review plan is complete and must be cleaned up without removing its implementation evidence.
constraints: Delete only the named plan document.
Retain all archive pairs, index entries, and v0.5.31 release evidence.
intent.rationale: A final cleanup Work Item closes the user-requested loop while preserving auditability.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly requested cleanup after Work Item 18 completion.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
